Among these sentences, which one has a causative verb?
options_html: The headmaster rises early in the morning.
The headmaster raises the flag every day.
He learns how to manage the committee.
The students remember their teacher’s birthday.
correct_answer_html: The headmaster raises the flag every day.

question_html: They are excited for the trip, _____.
The doctor suggested that _______.
Complete the sentence: If we leave now, ________.

We had the technician _____ the air conditioner before summer.

Fill in the blank with appropriate verb.
He doesn’t enjoy horror movies, ______.
Had the police come earlier, they _____ the burglar.
The coach made the team ____extra hours.
Which phrase can be used to complete the sentence below: ‘I request that ____.’
options_html: you may take the matter seriously
you will take the matter seriously

question_html: She let her friend ____the book.
If it turns colder,_____.
options_html: we will turn on the heater
we turn on the heater
we would turn on the heater
we would turns on the heater
correct_answer_html: we will turn on the heater

question_html: Which of the following is a causative verb?
You got me _____ with your studies.
She likes to sing, and ________.
If you had finished the work timely, ________.
options_html: you wouldn’t have missed the show
correct_answer_html: you wouldn’t have missed the show
